title: P0.5 — research in auto-chain; KB/report downstream consumption

metadata.description: P0.5 — research in auto-chain; KB/report downstream consumption
metadata.qc: Initial tri-review (qc1+qc2+qc3): qc1 Request Changes (C-1 daemon-runtime gate regression + 3 Warnings + 3 Suggestions), qc2 Approve (reclassified 4 daemon failures as expected behavior, 2 Warnings + 2 Suggestions), qc3 Request Changes (W-1 exit_when manual stalls auto-chain, W-2 research artifacts not in produce input, 3 Warnings + 2 Suggestions). Consolidated gate Request Changes. Fix wave (3 commits) closed C-1 + W-1 + W-2. PM-validated merge after green tests (clippy clean, 266 daemon-runtime, 17 research, 21 auto_chain, 156 local-db all pass). 3 low Warnings (W-3 run_intents impact, W-4 versioning policy, W-5 status hint format) deferred to V1.40 hygiene. 5 Suggestions deferred.
metadata.qa: skipped per harness convention for the round (initial QC tri-review + fix wave + 17 research + 21 auto_chain + 266 daemon-runtime + 156 local-db tests pass + clippy clean + fmt clean provide equivalent evidence; full QA in iteration sign-off if needed)
shipped: Research preset run_intents work_init -> knowledge_ingest (T1) — aligns with creator-workflow.md §3.1
Research preset gates: intake_status==complete + work_ref required (T1) — enforces meaningful research prerequisites
Auto-chain research stage wiring: enqueue_auto_chain_schedule helper reused (T2) — research → produce transitions through P0's supervisor terminal hook
KB write path verification (T3) — research capabilities write through existing kb_store / reference_source DAOs (no new code)
Produce context sees research-derived material (T4) — research_artifacts_dir field added to WorkFields, populated for produce stage; flows through build_preset_input
Research status hint in creator run status (T5) — in_progress / complete / done based on current_stage + stage_status
17 hermetic tests (T6 + Fix wave): 14 research unit/wiring tests + 3 new produce/research_artifacts_dir tests
Fix C-1: preset gates conditional on work_id presence (auto-chain enforces; direct schedule API path skips when work_id absent) — 4 previously-failing fl_e_schedule_api tests now pass
Fix W-1: synthesizing.exit_when kind manual -> kind llm_judge with synthesizing-exit.md prompt — auto-chain progresses autonomously (AC1)
Fix W-2: research_artifacts_dir field in WorkFields + build_preset_input wired — produce stage sees research output path (AC2 + AC3)
